His match is 30-year-old nursing home owner Natasha, whose quick wit and dry sense of humour seem set to give Mani a run for his money. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. And can the couple compromise on their new location?Short:After buying their current home at a top market price, Michelle and Danielle want to ensure theyre not losing any money. Will the brothers huge renovation secure a high-selling sum?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, Gillian and husband Steve kick things off with a simple menu and put the emphasis on presentation. Day two sees Holly and Richard lay on a vegetarian meal, which fails to please Gillian. Foodies Jen and Alex host the final night, featuring some rap poetry

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A trio of couples compete to be the best dinner party hosts in Coventry, beginning with joker Neal and his level-headed wife Hazel, who let themselves down with a few cooking errors. Ed and Jess keep things simple on day two, although a secret from Neals past has the diners in hysterics, before Emma and Huseyin round the contest off with a Turkish menu

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Car mad groom-to-be Adam brings the two loves of his life together, by organising a wedding ceremony for his fiancee Victoria in the middle of a car show. However, the bride-to-be has always pictured a wedding day steeped in romance and gothic grandeur, and there is the possibility that Adams car will not make it to the ceremony without breaking down

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kyle plans a demolition derby style wedding, complete with an old banger, a race track, and a rented wedding dress. However, his fiancee Katie dreams of the exact opposite - she wants a traditional affair with a perfect dress to match

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: YouTube star and internet sensation Bethany Mota goes undercover to meet up-and-coming social media hopefuls who are trying to break through. Disguised as an ordinary girl with a punk rock style who dreams of starting her own channel, Bethany meets a world champion beat-boxer, a pair of comical twin pranksters and an inspiring hip hop dance teacher. In the end, Bethany reveals her true identity in a surprising way and helps make their dreams come true

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: American football and baseball star Deion Sanders goes undercover to meet inspiring sports coaches and deserving fans. Disguised as a businessman who hopes to start a youth football programme, Deion meets two coaches who work with inner-city kids and a remarkable fan with a really surprising story. In the end, Deion reveals his true identity to reward their generosity and help turn their dreams into reality

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppis and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCools from season one

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

And when the couple go house hunting, theres a home so good, theres instant tears. But can they afford it? Short:The twins tackle terrible tiles in Danielle and Steves suburban home. Finally its Biancas turn to cook for her guests and expectations are high for the foodie of the week to cook up a great meal with the help of husband Dave. But who will secure the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Reading compete to host the best dinner party. Upstanding couple Liz and David kick off the competition with a menu replicating the first food they ever cooked together. However, prank-loving guests Jo and Steve take centre stage as talk around the table turns a bit alternative. On fashion models Franky and Charlis night, Liz proves to be the wildcard as she reveals how much shes researched their online portfolios. On the final night, Jo cannot stomach whats on her and Steves own menu. However, it remains to be seen who will walk away with the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jack has three weeks and £12,000 to organise the biggest magic show ever for his wedding day to Sarah. However, his fiancee wants nothing more than one day in her life when Jack and his magic take a back seat so that she can be the centre of attention

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.desc: Once again, maître d Fred Sirieix plays Cupid at the Manchester restaurant. First to arrive is 36-year-old, larger-than-life stand-up comedian Mani. Despite his confidence on stage, hes yet to find a strong, independent Pakistani Muslim woman he can settle down with off stage. His match is 30-year-old nursing home owner Natasha, whose quick wit and dry sense of humour seem set to give Mani a run for his money. Twenty nine-year-old hairdresser Scott has a history of relationships being cut short. Hes paired with gentle giant and self-confessed Nintendo geek Lewis, who wonders if his love of computer games is the thing thats keeping him single

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harpers father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing theyd never let her go

Plus, nanny and pony groom Fabia is matched with country boy George, who supposedly sports a bit of an edge. programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesnt react well to criticism. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklaters film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Barts life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil spends quality time with Haley and takes her on a tour of his old college. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay are forced to talk about an intimate subject with Manny. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The gang is quick to help a neighbour whose house has burnt down, but nothing quite works out the way it was intended. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Im Just a Girl Who Cant Say Doh
programme.desc: Marge puts on a play written by Lisa when she gets a big job at the theatre, while Homer develops a crush on Maggies baby class supervisor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Americas Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining contestants head to Santa Monica pier, where they are required to model clothes designed by the Kardashians on a moving carousel in high heels. Guest judge La Toya Jackson helps the girls with the photoshoot theme, while behind the scenes, Shannon devises a way the house phone can be shared equally, but ends up in tears when her idea is challenged by Bianca.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie cant drop off to sleep, Homer tells her a bedtime story about a holiday to the Grand Canyon taken by the Simpsons and the Flanders. At first the two families are at odds, but when they get stranded, Homer and Ned must go for help and the clans begin to bond

programme.title: Men in Black: International (2019)
programme.desc: The intergalactic law enforcers have always protected the Earth from the scum of the universe. This time they tackle their biggest threat - a mole in the Men in Black organisation. Director F Gary Grays fantasy sequel, starring Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Rebecca Ferguson

programme.title: Die Hard (1988)
programme.desc: New York cop John McClane visits Los Angeles to see his family over the Christmas holiday. Stopping off at his wifes place of work, he realises armed men have taken over the building and are holding the corporations staff to ransom - and only he has the ability to fight back. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis, Alan Rickman and Bonnie Bedelia

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. Six-foot pansexual opera singer Clare is looking for a man as tall as she is, while Jessica, who has a disastrous dating history, hopes to bring out her naughty side

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: TV weather presenter Sian Lloyd is wary of media attention after the collapse of her marriage, but gourmet cheese merchant Max is intent on melting her heart. Daniel Brocklebank - aka Coronation Street vicar Billy - fears kiss-and-tells, so wants to meet someone who doesnt know who he is. American Dustin may be just the man - if he can get over how similar they are. This instalment also sees Made in Chelsea star Jess Woodley meet up with wide-boy entrepreneur Luke, and Educating Yorkshire participant Musharaf Asghar embark on his first ever date

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during a week in March 2021, including Line of Duty, Ant and Decs Saturday Night Takeaway, This Is My House, The Proof Is Out There, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, Countdown, This Morning, and vaccines on the News

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Four more celebrities go in search of romance with members of the public. Brad Simpson, lead singer of boy band the Vamps, meets an 18-year-old fan, while Atomic Kittens Natasha Hamilton goes on her first date since splitting up with fellow pop star Ritchie Neville, the father of her fourth child. Bernie Clifton, mainstay of 1970s and 1980s TV with his ostrich puppet, has an encounter with an 80-something bellydancer, while rugby league player Keegan Hirst gets an introduction to the gay dating scene from a fitness adviser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfields first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica goes on a date with a guy from the coffee shop, while Geoffrey ends up on an episode of The Dating Game. Beverly learns that Murray has spontaneously purchased a shore house

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Following Erica and Geoffs break-up, Murray decides to take Erica out on a daddy-daughter date to cheer her up, and Adam is excited to participate in the school senior prank

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. Retired dentist Leanne is recently divorced and in search of a sexually experimental man, while former US marine Conor, who falls in love all too easily, is looking for his dream Englishwoman

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Couples Retreat continues amid a sour atmosphere, with Becs comments from the first night fuelling a venomous divide in the group

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Its a Sin, Ant and Decs Saturday Night Takeaway, Married at First Sight Australia, Snakes in the City, Surviving Death, This Morning and Gordon Ramsays Bank Balance. Plus, BBC news coverage of Boris Johnsons road map announcement concerning reducing the restrictions of lockdown

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry gets Jealous when Geoff invites Erica to a taping of their favourite TV talk show. Beverly causes Adam to doubt his relationship with Brea

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Determined to outdo her rival, Beverly starts selling makeup for a French company. When the NFL players go on strike, Barry decides to try out for the Philadelphia Eagles

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mothers boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding. However, his attention-shunning fiancee wants her wedding day to be something intimate and contemporary

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire lands an interview for her dream job, but is thwarted on her way to the interview by Phils tricky staircase. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch debate the pros and cons of adopting another baby after unexpectedly receiving a call from their adoption agency.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell is having a hard time letting go of his old life, leading to an intervention from Gloria to help him say goodbye. Meanwhile, Haley, Luke and Alex decide to throw a party at the Dunphy house when Claire and Phil leave for a trip, and Dylans mother takes the twins for the night

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters arent improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Geoff compete against Barry and Joanne to see who is the best couple. Meanwhile, Adam gets a job to prove his independence to Brea

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly involves herself in Erica and Barrys relationships, and Adam and Brea are cast opposite of each other in the school play, but rivalry sours things

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay accidentally gatecrashes Mitch and Camerons night out with their friends Pepper, Longines and Crispin, but surprisingly enjoys his time with the group. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire are concerned when Luke befriends neighbour Mr Kleezak, and despite Camerons misgivings, Haley babysits Lily. Guest starring Nathan Lane (The Producers)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted to accept the role of interim music director at Luke and Mannys school, but his enthusiasm fails to rub off on the students. Meanwhile, Jays brother Donnie (guest star Jonathan Banks) comes to town, but their sibling rivalry goes too far, and Phil persuades his family to appear in his new advert

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Couples Retreat continues amid a sour atmosphere, with Becs comments from the first night fuelling a venomous divide in the group

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Once again, maître d Fred Sirieix plays Cupid at the Manchester restaurant. First to arrive is 36-year-old, larger-than-life stand-up comedian Mani. Despite his confidence on stage, hes yet to find a strong, independent Pakistani Muslim woman he can settle down with off stage. His match is 30-year-old nursing home owner Natasha, whose quick wit and dry sense of humour seem set to give Mani a run for his money. Twenty nine-year-old hairdresser Scott has a history of relationships being cut short. Hes paired with gentle giant and self-confessed Nintendo geek Lewis, who wonders if his love of computer games is the thing thats keeping him single

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harpers father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing theyd never let her go

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay helps Manny with a school fundraiser involving lots of wrapping paper, and Claire petitions for a stop sign at a busy junction. Meanwhile, Mitchell is determined to prove a point to Cameron, but neither of them will back down. American comedy, guest starring David Cross (Arrested Development), with Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All the men in the three dysfunctional households feel angry - including Mitch and Cam, who are involved in a traffic accident, and Jay, who is frustrated at work. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Couples Retreat continues amid a sour atmosphere, with Becs comments from the first night fuelling a venomous divide in the group

programme.title: Americas Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models audition for a role in detective drama CSI: Crime Scene Investigation in front of the shows creator Anthony E Zuiker. Meanwhile, one girl fears she will be eliminated due to a health scare

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is distressed when Lisa signs up for the opportunity to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, but a cunning strategy using reverse psychology to discourage her daughter from carrying out her plan goes badly awry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against the friendship between Bart and a child who is famous influencer

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a deeply divisive week away, everyones grinding their axes ahead of the fifth dinner party, where friendships are fractured and the groups dynamic is irreversibly altered

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party
programme.desc: Rachel, Steven, Scott, Danny and Bec face off following the frenetic finger-banging feud at the Couples Retreat

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments and best TV shows from series 21. The armchair critics watch and share their opinions on Starstruck, Married at First Sight Australia, Challenge Anneka, The Piano and Fall

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Pop star Samuel Preston shot to fame when he fell in love with Chantelle Houghton inside the Big Brother house. He wonders whether lightning will strike again on his date with South African Nichole. Gogglebox star and TV presenter Scarlett Moffatt is hoping that martial arts fighter Tommy will prove to be full of banter and happy to see her without her fake tan on. Entrepreneur Jo Wood seeks someone who shares her love of a good time, while Britains Got Talent winner Ashleigh Butler hopes fellow dog-lover Elliot will live up to her - and Pudseys - expectations

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A professional dancer from London seeks a man who can pop some moves on the dance floor and also help him lose his virginity. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: First of the two-part finale of the comedy, with Phil and Claire deciding that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again. Meanwhile, as Gloria becomes more successful at work, she notices Jay, Manny and Joe dont seem to need her as much

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesnt react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later hes still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.desc: Rick explores the gastronomic delights of Ireland, paying a return visit to Corks English Market. He goes on to taste soda bread straight from the oven, before cooking classic Irish recipes such as beef and oyster pie with Guinness, and corned beef with cabbage

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: Rick meets the Nute family of Tintagel, who grow potatoes the old-fashioned way, and samples a few tipples at the Newton Abbot Beer Festival. Then its on to Yorkshire, where he samples award-winning herbs cultivated by Jekka McVicar, before heading for Cornwalls Cadgwith Cove

programme.desc: Ree Drummonds sharing recipes from her pizza place in town, as she makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver rustles up piri piri pork belly with crispy crackling, frugal hangover noodles topped with Asian-style crispy and runny fried egg, and two very different ideas for making the most of leftover lamb from a roast - a biryani and a crunchy noodle salad. Plus, a midweek showstopper in the form of Jamies grilled garlic mussels with sweet tomato soup, at just £1.30 a portion, and tips on how to use inexpensive frozen vegetables

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Gartens husband, Jeffrey, takes a pizza making class and learns to make a white pizza, while Ina prepares a platter of rocket with prosciutto and burrata

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.sub-title: Cooking for Jeffrey: It Must be Friday
programme.desc: Ina shakes things up with skillet-roasted lemon chicken with roasted broccolini, then follows with raspberry rhubarb crostata with ice cream for dessert

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: From 2011, 12 enthusiastic home-cooks take part in a culinary contest devised by Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry to determine which of them is Britains best amateur baker. In the first round, the competitors are challenged to make 24 decorated cupcakes in two hours, before being asked to bake a coffee and walnut Battenberg cake. programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver rustles up piri piri pork belly with crispy crackling, frugal hangover noodles topped with Asian-style crispy and runny fried egg, and two very different ideas for making the most of leftover lamb from a roast - a biryani and a crunchy noodle salad. Plus, a midweek showstopper in the form of Jamies grilled garlic mussels with sweet tomato soup, at just £1.30 a portion, and tips on how to use inexpensive frozen vegetables

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by fellow chef Tony Singh for a tour of the Isle of Skye. Tony begins by visiting a local bakery that doubles as an art gallery. He also learns how to make the local oatcakes. James, meanwhile, is inspired by the seafood to cook a dish using plaice and lovage. The duo then take a boat trip, where they go dolphin spotting, and James cooks up a fresh lobster and langoustine dish with an added Scottish twist

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James visits the Shetland Islands, an area of natural beauty that hes always wanted to see. He gets to hire a vintage car to explore the area, where he learns about traditional fish salting and cooks a tasty vegetable curry at a local social enterprise project. Later on, James learns all about Shetland community spirit and cake at one of their famous Sunday teas, and finally cooks up a Shetland-inspired paella on a beautiful local beach

programme.title: Code Name: Geronimo (2012)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the 2011 American attack on Osama Bin Ladens compound in Pakistan, which resulted in the death of the terrorist leader. programme.title: Beware My Brethren (1972)
programme.desc: A journalist finds herself in danger when she infiltrates a sinister religious cult - especially when she suspects that one members homicidal tendencies have found an outlet in slaughtering unfortunate sinners to save their souls. Thriller, starring Tony Beckley, Suzanna Leigh, Ann Todd, Patrick Magee and Percy Herbert

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team tries to provide the evidence needed to convict a serial killer but faces a series of challenges and struggles to reach the courtroom in time

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy agrees to act as a decoy and puts her life on the line in the course of duty. Eighties police drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A young woman with ESP abilities helps Steve search the Everglades for a missing scientist. Fantasy adventure, starring Lee Majors and Pamela Franklin

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind (1965)
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for outlaws, find themselves pursued by a relentless posse. Western, written, starring and co-produced by Jack Nicholson, with Cameron Mitchell and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Gone to Texas (1986)
programme.desc: Fact-based Western telling the story of the general and politician Sam Houston. While Texas was under Mexican rule, he became a leading figure in the fight for independence, ultimately rising to become commander in chief of the regions armies which he led to a decisive final victory at the battle of San Jacinto. Starring Sam Elliott, Claudia Christian and Michael Beck

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A deranged psychiatrist from the Tantalus Penal Colony smuggles himself aboard the USS Enterprise, prompting McCoy and Kirk to investigate the prisons director, who is using a sinister device to control the minds of inmates and staff. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: The bionic hero faces a killer robot. Action adventure, starring Lee Majors, Richard Anderson and John Saxon

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The dedicated police officer faces a conflict of interests while tracking a gang of thieves who successfully emptied the contents of an armoured car. Can he bring them to justice without compromising his efforts to help the sister of one of the suspects? Drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walkers two-star rookies must track down a terrorist who threatens to unleash a deadly bioweapon on the city if the authorities do not meet his demands within 48 hours

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro (1998)
programme.desc: The sword-wielding saviour of Spanish California returns after 20 years in prison, tutoring a thief to take over his heroic role and tackle corrupt government officials, who are using slave labour to mine gold illegally. Both mentor and pupil have personal scores to settle with their enemies, led by a ruthless governor and a psychotic military officer. Swashbuckling adventure, with Anthony Hopkins, Antonio Banderas and Catherine Zeta-Jones.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration (2009)
programme.desc: A dead soldier who was brought back to life as the ultimate killing machine is revived once more to deal with terrorists who have taken control of a nuclear reactor. He finds his enemies not only have a more advanced reanimated soldier in their ranks, but they have also resurrected an old foe of his. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme and Dolph Lundgren

programme.title: Anti-Life (2020)
programme.desc: A junior mechanic aboard a interstellar ship, en route to a new planet, must outwit a cosmic terror intent on using the spaceship as a weapon. Action sci-fi, starring Bruce Willis, Cody Kearsley, Rachel Nichols, Kassandra Clementi and Johnny Messner

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers (1956)
programme.desc: A small California town is infiltrated by sinister alien vegetable pods from outer space, which start to clone the residents and replace them with emotionless replicas. A local doctor realises something bizarre is going on and sets out to investigate - but is not prepared for what he finds. Don Siegels sci-fi thriller, with Kevin McCarthy, Dana Wynter and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.title: A Study in Terror (1965)
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes receives a mysterious package with a connection to a series of murders. Aided by his brother Mycroft and trusty sidekick Dr Watson, he is soon on the trail of the Victorian ages most infamous killer - Jack the Ripper. His investigation leads to a conspiracy involving eminent politicians and the aristocracy. Thriller, with John Neville, Donald Houston, John Fraser, Robert Morley, Judi Dench and Barbara Windsor

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Southern Star (1969)
programme.desc: A fortune hunter finds a priceless diamond in Africa, but is relentlessly hunted by rivals keen to steal it. Comedy adventure, with George Segal, Ursula Andress and Orson Welles

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise is caught in the deadly grip of an alien spaceship whose commander, the enigmatic and ruthless Balok, gives the crew just 10 minutes to live. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve uses his strength to repair a damaged aircraft in order to escape an African nation with filmed proof of UN treaty violations

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ex-colleague of Hooker becomes obsessed with avenging his daughters rape. Police drama, starring William Shatner, with a guest appearance by fellow Star Trek veteran Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An accountant speaks out against his former boss who is a notorious crook, causing the new Rangers Gage and Sydney to shield the man and his family from the criminals wrath

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomons diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichtons novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian (2011)
programme.desc: An evil warlord kills a barbarian chieftain, whose son grows up to be a mighty warrior and seeks revenge for his fathers death. He finds there is more at stake, as the tyrant is close to acquiring all the pieces of a magic mask, which will make him all-powerful. Fantasy adventure, with Jason Momoa, Stephen Lang, Ron Perlman and Rose McGowan

programme.title: Revenge (2017)
programme.desc: A hunting trip turns into a nightmare for a couple when two sleazy friends arrive unannounced, setting off a gruesome chain of events. Thriller, starring Matilda Lutz, Kevin Janssens and Vincent Colombe

programme.title: A Certain Justice (2014)
programme.desc: A military veteran suffering from post-traumatic stress comes to the aid of a prostitute who is being attacked by members of a white supremacist group. He kills some of the men in the ensuing confrontation, and the leader of the racist gang vows revenge on the soldiers family. Action adventure, starring Cung Le, Dolph Lundgren and Vinnie Jones.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Betting shop owner Les, 40, is rushed to St Georges after losing control of his car on a country road on his way to work. Cambelle, a 21-year-old plumber, has an infected cyst that may require surgery, while 67-year-old retired doctor Patrick is brought to AandE following a horse-riding accident in which he was dragged 130ft and not found for more than two hours

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew battles bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny, while Scotts attempts at DIY land him in serious trouble, and biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of teenage mountain biker Steven, a multi-vehicle collision in Bedford leaves 32-year-old Ashley with potentially life-changing injuries, and Nicola steps in to save her husband Michaels life when he has a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St Georges for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into AandE after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. In Israel, Kate unearths the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery. In Iceland, Jimmy investigates Skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product, and in Cornwall, Matt dives for edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon OBrien are in Woking, Surrey, where they find a sidecar - to be transformed into a boat - and a water cylinder that Simon might make into a trendy lamp

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of BandB owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodds dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancys complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the weeks first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean BandB near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the hosts chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bargain-hunter Heidi hosts the first of five dinner parties in Hertfordshire, hoping her adventurous Asian menu will impress set her on the way to the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the second night from Hertfordshire, bank clerk Sylvia hosts a 1980s-themed evening featuring a menu of Spanish cuisine and a show-stopping tribute to Madonna

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Showbiz journalist Benji hosts the third dinner party of the week in Hertfordshire, hoping to impress his guests with a Gran Canaria-themed night featuring airline-inspired dishes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Hertfordshire, childrens nurse and guide leader Nicky, plans a menu inspired by her dream visit to Asia, with complicated home cooking and geographical grub

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Hertfordshire, party-loving Mark hosts a Greek evening, with saganaki and lamb kleftiko on the menu. Marks kept his cards close to his chest all week, so his guests are keen to find out more about him, on a night that ends with an action-packed obstacle course around his kitchen, and an emotional moment at the dinner table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: The Kings Head and Queens Jules
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson are first to host at the Kings Head and Queens Jules in Suffolk, where they provide their guests with a lesson in how to fillet fish, and an evening of karaoke. However, the owners find criticism hard to take the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Blossom welcome their rivals to the Hotel Continental in Harwich, Essex, where they are greeted by an erotic art display. The guests enjoy participating in a poetry reading during the afternoon, each writing their own piece, but the mornings breakfast goes awry after the hosts have a disagreement

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ryan Davies has to deal with a crisis when the contestants stay his five-star BandB Llanerch Vineyard in south Wales, but still manages to impress with his location and selection of wines. However, Gordon and Blossom go on a fault-finding mission and leave feedback the host is not happy with

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy Bullows, owners of the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire, play host to the last night of the weeks competition. Hoping to impress with a mix of professionalism and efficiency, they decide to take their guests on a tour of a local paint factory, but tempers fray and a stony silence follows at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two young couples who were looking to take their all-important first steps on the property ladder in London. First, Phil meets Cat and Ed, who were searching for a home in the area around Chiswick, before revisiting Ian and Sarah, who were in love with the idea of finding a property in Balham

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lucy and Lynton in East Grinstead, West Sussex, who are unsure whether to sell their home or renovate instead. Lucy is set on staying where they are as its the first place she has owned, but Lynton finds the house claustrophobic, and longs to find a new home they could fall in love with

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: Documentary following the route of the train from London to Istanbul, charting the history of the Orient Express and examining how Europe has changed over the past 150 years. In the opening edition, the train rolls out and heads east, past the home of a forgotten villain whose fortunes were transformed by his journeys on the Orient Express. In Paris, theres a trip to the Moulin Rouge for a memorable night at the birthplace of the high-kicking can-can dance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. Kate heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato and finds herself slap bang in the middle of the worlds biggest food fight. Jimmy visits Italy to investigate the difference between risotto rice and long grain. Matt finds out why pork scratchings arent made from British pigs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couples afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following mornings feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House BandB in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. She takes her guests to a local brewery and an upmarket restaurant, where everyone seems to enjoy themselves, but the revelation that a ghost may roam the rooms of the BandB leaves some of the participants nervous

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in and around Kingston-upon-Hull, drinks brand ambassador Dan, hopes that his classic Greek grub will go down well with his guests and make for a memorable start to the week. Dans guests - florist Jayne, business manager Tony, computer games fanatic Matt and dog walker Jordanna - have their work cut out getting a word in

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in and around Hull, computer fanatic Matt doesnt get off to the best start when he singes his starter and his spicy main course has his guests reaching for jugs of water to cool off. Things go from bad to worse when Matts dessert elicits howls of laughter and proves inedible. After chat about superpowers and saucy sausages, the guests enjoy some sumo shenanigans in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog walking entrepreneur Jordanna hosts on the third night in and around Hull. She plans a Mexican-themed evening in a bid to prove that 22-year-olds are good cooks and can host a perfect dinner party. Her guests admire her queso fundido, and Matt is so impressed with her home-made tortillas that he offers to kiss her feet. But will a confusing dessert, stray dog hairs and rats at the table scupper her chance of winning the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host is the self-proclaimed number one florist in Hull, Jayne, who plans to give her guests a taste of Spain with her trio of tapas, colourful paella and crema catalana. Tony gets into the spirit by dressing as a matador, but will Jayne dance into the lead will her mix of food and flamenco?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The last night heads from Hull across to Doncaster to find business manager Tony hosting with some countryside cuisine. Things dont quite go to plan when he has to stomach a large portion of blunt feedback about the authenticity of his locally sourced supper, dirty cutlery and gloopy gravy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the African-themed Foxholm BandB in North Yorkshire begins another competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey initially impress their guests with a cupcake class, but tempers fray when John Shields makes an unfavourable remark about German-born Sigrid

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rival hoteliers to the Pack Horse, an American diner-themed BandB in Lincolnshire, for the second round of the competition. A horse-riding session turns sour when Steve Reed takes a dislike to Nick Lawler, and matters get worse over dinner - before a pancake shortage at breakfast causes problems for the hosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Sigrid Reed host at their Glenwalden BandB in Blackpool. They hope ballroom dancing will entertain the guests, some of whom object to the pink flock wallpaper and knitted toilet roll holders. Nick Lawler seems to be warming to the owners, but one of them suspects his change of heart is all part of a cunning plan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Lawler and business partner Kate Wilson host the competition at the Winder Hall Country House BandB in the Lake District, but a clash of egos ensues when they try to lecture the other participants about how to manage their hospitality establishments, and a disastrous breakfast service leaves contestants unimpressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit two couples who were previously featured on the show. Sam and Krystle were keen to move from their rented flat in Deptford into their own place, while long-distance partners Jason and Jaye were looking for a one-bedroom pad with outside space in Clapham or Brixton to finally bring them together

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head back to Albrighton in Shropshire to catch up with Jamie Lea and Curtis. Back in 2019 theyd reached a stalemate after buying and doing up their three-bedroom terrace home. At the time, psychology student Jamie Lea wanted to settle down and enjoy family life with their daughter Scarlett and their soon-to-be-born second child. But Curtis had itchy feet and was constantly trawling the internet for their next doer-upper. He wanted a bigger house with a better garden in the countryside for their growing family. Kirstie came up with a plan to give them the family space they needed, but with a tight Love It budget of £30,000, Curtis and Jamie Lea had to use every ounce of elbow grease and savvy to stretch it as far as possible. Meanwhile, Phils List It budget of £280,000 was equally tough. He scoured the area and found three stunning properties to win over Jamie Lea, including a huge four-bed project, but what did the couple decide to do in the end? Four years on, Phil catches up with Jamie Lea, Curtis and their growing family to find out what happened next

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Blanca starts experiencing episodes of listlessness and dizziness, unaware that the increasingly concerning Nanni is spiking her drinks. But shes distracted from her mystery symptoms when the body of a student is found on premises owned by an oil company and nobody seems to know why she might have been there. In Italian

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, the heli-medics help a man who is fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest. A tumble on an obstacle course leaves fun-runner Vijitha with a painful open fracture. Plus, in Northumberland, seven-year-old Imogen suffers an impalement at the bike track

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE documentary series turns its attention to caring and kindness at St Georges Hospital in south-west London, highlighting altruistic acts from staff, patients and visitors alike. A 13-year-old cyclist experiencing bouts of unconsciousness is sent for a CT scan, and 84-year-old Ursula, who was born in Germany, arrives in resus having lost a lot of blood during a series of severe nose-bleeds. Plus, 76-year-old Margaret is brought in to St Georges after suffering a suspected stroke during a routine appointment at another hospital, and the doctors must quickly administer a clot-busting drug if they are to prevent further damage to her brain

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, heli-medics battle to keep Mick alive after he has a seizure. A fun day takes a turn at the motocross track that leaves 12-year-old Ollie with a limb-threatening injury. And in the Yorkshire Dales, theres a dramatic hillside rescue for seriously-injured paraglider Alastair

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of teenage mountain biker Steven, a multi-vehicle collision in Bedford leaves 32-year-old Ashley with potentially life-changing injuries, and Nicola steps in to save her husband Michaels life when he has a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St Georges for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into AandE after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. In Israel, Kate unearths the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery. In Iceland, Jimmy investigates Skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product, and in Cornwall, Matt dives for edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon OBrien are in Woking, Surrey, where they find a sidecar - to be transformed into a boat - and a water cylinder that Simon might make into a trendy lamp

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of BandB owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodds dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancys complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the weeks first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean BandB near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the hosts chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bargain-hunter Heidi hosts the first of five dinner parties in Hertfordshire, hoping her adventurous Asian menu will impress set her on the way to the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the second night from Hertfordshire, bank clerk Sylvia hosts a 1980s-themed evening featuring a menu of Spanish cuisine and a show-stopping tribute to Madonna

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Showbiz journalist Benji hosts the third dinner party of the week in Hertfordshire, hoping to impress his guests with a Gran Canaria-themed night featuring airline-inspired dishes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Hertfordshire, childrens nurse and guide leader Nicky, plans a menu inspired by her dream visit to Asia, with complicated home cooking and geographical grub

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Hertfordshire, party-loving Mark hosts a Greek evening, with saganaki and lamb kleftiko on the menu. Marks kept his cards close to his chest all week, so his guests are keen to find out more about him, on a night that ends with an action-packed obstacle course around his kitchen, and an emotional moment at the dinner table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: The Kings Head and Queens Jules
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson are first to host at the Kings Head and Queens Jules in Suffolk, where they provide their guests with a lesson in how to fillet fish, and an evening of karaoke. However, the owners find criticism hard to take the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Blossom welcome their rivals to the Hotel Continental in Harwich, Essex, where they are greeted by an erotic art display. The guests enjoy participating in a poetry reading during the afternoon, each writing their own piece, but the mornings breakfast goes awry after the hosts have a disagreement

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ryan Davies has to deal with a crisis when the contestants stay his five-star BandB Llanerch Vineyard in south Wales, but still manages to impress with his location and selection of wines. However, Gordon and Blossom go on a fault-finding mission and leave feedback the host is not happy with

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy Bullows, owners of the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire, play host to the last night of the weeks competition. Hoping to impress with a mix of professionalism and efficiency, they decide to take their guests on a tour of a local paint factory, but tempers fray and a stony silence follows at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two young couples who were looking to take their all-important first steps on the property ladder in London. First, Phil meets Cat and Ed, who were searching for a home in the area around Chiswick, before revisiting Ian and Sarah, who were in love with the idea of finding a property in Balham

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lucy and Lynton in East Grinstead, West Sussex, who are unsure whether to sell their home or renovate instead. Lucy is set on staying where they are as its the first place she has owned, but Lynton finds the house claustrophobic, and longs to find a new home they could fall in love with

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: Documentary following the route of the train from London to Istanbul, charting the history of the Orient Express and examining how Europe has changed over the past 150 years. In the opening edition, the train rolls out and heads east, past the home of a forgotten villain whose fortunes were transformed by his journeys on the Orient Express. In Paris, theres a trip to the Moulin Rouge for a memorable night at the birthplace of the high-kicking can-can dance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Betting shop owner Les, 40, is rushed to St Georges after losing control of his car on a country road on his way to work. Cambelle, a 21-year-old plumber, has an infected cyst that may require surgery, while 67-year-old retired doctor Patrick is brought to AandE following a horse-riding accident in which he was dragged 130ft and not found for more than two hours

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE documentary series turns its attention to caring and kindness at St Georges Hospital in south-west London, highlighting altruistic acts from staff, patients and visitors alike. programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. programme.sub-title: Islands of the Forth: Fortress Islands of the Forth
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island-hopping odyssey, exploring the islands scattered in the Firth of Forth. Paul learns about the strategic importance of Inchkeiths defences during two world wars before heading to the Bass Rock to learn more about the history of prisoners incarcerated on the island, with 160,000 gannets for company

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Life at the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Paul Murton returns to visit more islands off the coastline, beginning with the Outer Hebrides. He resumes his journey on Eriskay, where he discovers how the remote location helped preserve a unique way of life for centuries - and also allowed locals to hide thousands of bottles of whisky from the excise men when a ship laden with the thirst-quenching cargo ran aground in 1941. The story inspired the 1949 movie Whisky Galore! Moving on to Barra, Paul goes foraging for cockles and visits the only airport in the world where scheduled flights land on the beach, then heads across to Vatersay, where he joins local fishermen trawling for lobsters

programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 4
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott explore The Fens in search of treasure, ticking off five east of England counties in their trusty Vanden Plas Princess. As the competition gets down to the pointy end, they apply their business heads on but still cannot resist some shenanigans on the way. At the shops, Raj falls in love with the oldest thing hes ever found on the Road Trip, even if he cant pronounce whats written on the ticket. Irita discovers a secret door barred to the general public and discovers long-forgotten and very dusty treasures

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 5
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to the seaside in Lincolnshire, for their last chance to hit the shops before the final auction showdown. At the shops, Irita comes over all nostalgic as she stumbles across items from her childhood. She also gets her hands on some exquisite, enamelled artwork that she feels would benefit from being dismantled. Raj racks up a haul of potential purchases, but still finds time for a spot of puppetry. He also discovers the birthplace of the package holiday and meets the towns jovial mascot who has been pulling in the punters for over 100 years

programme.title: The Repair Shop

A well-loved family recipe book and an art deco clock also receive much-needed restorations
