programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The lads decide its time to expand their empire in Cork city, as their days of doing all the hard work are over - they plan on being the bosses now. Starring Alex Murphy and Hilary Rose

programme.title: A Room with a View (1985)
programme.desc: A naive woman accompanies an older cousin on a trip to Florence, where she falls in love with a forward-thinking man. She is forced to cut short the romance and return to a loveless engagement in England, where the object of her affection makes an unexpected appearance. Period drama from James Ivory, based on EM Forsters novel and starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Denholm Elliott, Daniel Day-Lewis, Julian Sands and Judi Dench

programme.title: A Date for Mad Mary (2016)
programme.desc: A woman returns home after being released from a young offenders institute, just in time for her best friends wedding. However, she finds she has not been allotted a plus one, since everyone assumes she will never get a date. She resolves to prove her friends wrong, and learns a few things about herself in the process. Romantic comedy, starring Seána Kerslake and Charleigh Bailey

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes at Dublin Castle to explore a major exhibition bringing the 1926 Census to life. Richard Downes presents

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: The singer sits down with guests Jose Andres and Martha Stewart

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Ireland in Music
programme.desc: The country becomes a stage as Irelands finest musicians perform at the most beautiful and iconic places on the island, and catch up with presenter Denise Chaila. In the first show, Denise meets Dublin singer-songwriter David Kitt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Vance prepares to host diplomatic talks with Venezuela, the team is called in to investigate the dead body of one of his inside men. venCrime drama, starring Sean Murray, Wilmer Valderrama and Katrina Law

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: With a crumbling outbuilding and an overgrown vine out of control, Amanda Holden and Alan Carr raise the curtain on their biggest challenge yet as they take on the BandBs courtyard. Amanda has an idea to transform the space into a romantic movie set. Alan, however, is unconvinced by his friends vision. The duo meet up with tour guide and friend Bernado at the spectacular gardens of the Alhambra Palace to learn what plants thrive in the Spanish sun. Amanda gets blown away by local builder Rafas mosaic-filled cave house and ropes him in to help design a masterpiece of her own

programme.title: Am I Being Unreasonable?
programme.desc: A revelation about Nic sends her spiralling into panic and causes shockwaves throughout her family and friends. Does this mean her worst fears have come true and shes ruined her sons life? Is everything unravelling or can she get away with murder?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Maeves ego puts lives on the line, Jack and Rahu go under the radar, and TKs fix backfires badly

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: David and Cash bring Fredrick Byen in for questioning, and pending the results from the bail hearing on Holden, Abigail runs into Lacey at the Surf Club

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles present the semi-final, and in a first for the patisserie contest, the teams must create a plated dessert for each of the judges. With no recipe and just the ingredients and equipment before them, they draw on their experience to produce something that will hopefully stop Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin in their tracks. For the second challenge, they must create an edible table scene inspired by the land of the dinosaurs, with a large macaron cake at its heart

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Harrison Gardner gives advice to part-time teacher and mother of three Esther Foreman, who has no building experience but wants to construct the house of her dreams herself. With her partner Damien also helping out, the project starts to move along well, but as the seasons change its becomes clear this is no ordinary build as the sheer scale would be enough to scare off most people

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Robin tries to persuade the heavily pregnant Cherry to join him for a live-action, role-playing weekend, where everyone is to dress up as fantasy characters to drink mead and have sword fights in the woods. Rachel helps Sam prep for his potentially incredibly dangerous Duke of Edinburgh expedition, while Sue experiences difficulty opening a jar of gherkins

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Jack from Cork dreams of dating someone so good looking that people will assume he is very rich or very funny. Enter Marion from Limerick, who is so bad at dating that her friends have formed a group chat to vet her choices. Across the restaurant, retired business owner Garry is paired with glamorous divorcee Elizabeth, bubbly Amelia meets door-to-door salesman and serial extrovert Chris, and self-confessed daddys girl Eilish meets tractor-obsessed Adam, who bond over their shared love of machinery

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.sub-title: Ms De Brún and the Child of Prague
programme.desc: New English teacher Ms De Brún (Judith Roddy) arrives at Our Lady Immaculate and the friends immediately find themselves inspired. Meanwhile, Da Gerry attempts to take Ma Mary out on a date to the cinema, where things definitely dont go according to plan, and Sister Michael takes charge of a precious Child of Prague statue. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Ireland in Music
programme.desc: The country becomes a stage as Irelands finest musicians perform at the most beautiful and iconic places on the island, and catch up with presenter Denise Chaila. In the first show, Denise meets Dublin singer-songwriter David Kitt

programme.title: Making II
programme.desc: The second of a three-part series of documentary films by acclaimed filmmaker Pat Collins based on the annual Making In cultural event, which takes place each September at Joseph Walsh Studio in Fartha, County Cork. Featuring interviews and intimate conversations with a range of artists, architects, designers, musicians, sculptors and more, which highlight the dedication, devotion, and passion makers bring to their craft

programme.title: Im Yours
programme.desc: Zo is a high-flying solicitor in Irelands top law firm, but shes harbouring a secret - Zo is engaged to a man shes never met

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Maeve cuts deep, Jacks feelings take a turn, and TK fights for love

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tanes solicitor advises him to plead guilty, Mackenzie makes a call to Dean, asking if he could help make someone disappear, and Jo catches wind of Holden being granted bail

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: A severe ice storm knocks out the power, forcing the Critches to sit and talk to each other

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick discovers the history behind the Yorkshire pudding and how best to make this most famous of British foods. programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: The winners of the heats in Ireland, London, Cardiff and Glasgow head to Paris, where they are given the chance to impress the judges with their portraits of author and model Sophie Dahl. They are given six hours to create their masterpieces, before returning to the Royal Academy to reveal their work to the judges. Presented by Joan Bakewell and Frank Skinner

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two women strike up a friendship, but one appears to have highly questionable motives. Drama, with Cherie Lunghi and Carol Drinkwater

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: What Have You Been Up to Lately?
programme.desc: Two failed actors, whose marriages are also washed up, meet for the first time in years. It turns out to be a reunion that leads to tragedy for both. Drama, starring Peter Barkworth and Benjamin Whitrow

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A lawyer has blackmail in mind when he has a meeting with a famed detective to prove he convicted an innocent man

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A convicted robber is released to live with the family of one of his cellmates, against the better judgment of his parole officer

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From the Vaults
programme.desc: The Elbow frontman introduces more music from the TV archives, beginning by looking back at 1978

programme.title: Muddy Waters and the Rolling Stones - Live at the Checkerboard Lounge
programme.desc: As part of the Stones mammoth 1981 American tour, the rock band arrived in Chicago prior to playing three nights at the Rosemont Horizon. Long influenced by Chicago blues, they paid a visit to Buddy Guys club, The Checkerboard Lounge, to see Muddy Waters perform. Shortly afterwards, they joined the blues musician on stage for this performance

programme.title: The Stones in Exile
programme.desc: Alan Yentob visits France to introduce a film documenting the recording of the Rolling Stones 1972 album Exile on Main Street. Having faced ruin due to the size of their unpaid tax bills, the Stones relocated to the French Riviera to make the album, before completing the recording in Los Angeles - with Mick Jagger also finding time to get married in St Tropez. Alongside rare home-movie footage of the band at work, there are also interviews with Jagger, Keith Richards, Bill Wyman and Charlie Watts

programme.title: The Shadows: The Final Tour
programme.desc: A 2004 concert by the instrumental rock band at the Cardiff Indoor Arena, in which Hank Marvin, Bruce Welch and Brian Bennett reunited to perform a selection of their greatest hits. Including performances of Apache, Riders in the Sky, Dont Cry for Me Argentina, Theme from The Deer Hunter and FBI

programme.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2023
programme.desc: Highlights of the festival, which this year featured headline sets from Pulp, George Ezra, The Chemical Brothers and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: A look at female pioneers of the 1990s, when questions of feminism and control intensified and the likes of Missy Elliott, Courtney Love and Alanis Morissette made music on their own terms

programme.title: Kate Bush: The Timeless Genius
programme.desc: A look at the music and legacy of the singer-songwriter, revealing how she has managed to transcend eras and trends and influenced a new generation of artists

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton are called in to investigate the facts surrounding the death of a phone-sex operator. Gritty police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The team investigates the baffling death of a good Samaritan found wearing nothing but a pair of white gloves. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Teenager Logan starts work as an apprentice deck-hand, while landlady Pat recalls fond memories from her life in Brixham

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Gaffney allows a murder site to be washed down prematurely, destroying evidence and bringing him into conflict with Pembleton - who is promptly placed in charge of the case. Gritty police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton encounters a murder witness who has multiple personalities - and later proves to be the killer. Meanwhile, Beau spends time with his family and decides to break up with Megan. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: A Lie Agreed Upon - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Swearengen goads a preoccupied Bullock into an almighty brawl that could prove to be the final confrontation between the fiery pair, but neither of them can anticipate the return of Calamity Jane, who arrives on the scene with a vengeful agenda

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A prospector arrives in town with a blueprint for a significant mining operation. Swearengens ailing health brings cause for concern, although he refuses all offers of medical attention. Meanwhile, Farnum finds a buyer for the Hickok letter

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Bobby sets his sights on buying an NFL franchise, while Lara launches her own business venture. Chuck makes a last ditch effort to nail a big case

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Under pressure to make progress and with his case stalling, Chuck develops a new strategy. Axe considers donating half his net worth to charity. Wendy helps a tech billionaire assess a candidate for a special project. Drama, starring Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: With sales of Cerullo shoes lagging, Stefano makes a business deal with the Solaras, while Elena and Lila get unwelcome surprises. Italian drama

programme.desc: Deborah participates in a golf tournament to get face time with affiliates. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart, Hannah Einbinder and Carl Clemons-Hopkins

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Lindy adjusts to life by exploring Lulus dolls house, while Les works to find a way to make her big again, but neither are prepared to face their biggest obstacle of corporate red tape. Romantic sci-fi comedy drama, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen

programme.title: The Trip to Italy (2014)
programme.desc: Sequel to improvised comedy The Trip, with Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon once again playing versions of themselves. The two comedy actors are asked to embark on another round of restaurant reviews for a Sunday newspaper, this time in Italy. Steve is on hiatus from his American TV series and isnt drinking while Rob is looking to unwind with his time away from his young family

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.desc: Pembleton encounters a murder witness who has multiple personalities - and later proves to be the killer. Meanwhile, Beau spends time with his family and decides to break up with Megan. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Tensions between Sabi and Paul rise when Paul disappears and Sabi has to bail on a fun night to look after the kids

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixhams annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham relives its glory days by hosting a vintage ships race and heritage festival, and a local toy-shop owner faces a difficult decision

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Munch and Howard investigate the death of a teenager and Pembleton is sued by the multiple-personality serial killer, who claims he violated her civil rights during interrogation. Gritty police drama, starring Richard Belzer and Melissa Leo

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The team investigates a shooting and uncovers links to a cocaine cartel. Beau tries to discover his wifes whereabouts, while Bayliss reacts badly to being jilted by his girlfriend, and has to be rescued from the consequences of his own anger. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Deadwood

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Concrete Utopia (2023)
programme.desc: The world has been reduced to rubble by a massive earthquake, and in the heart of Seoul there is only one rsediential building left standing - Hwang Gung Apartments. Outsiders start coming to the flats, and feeling a threat to their survival, the residents enact a special measure. South Korean drama with subtitles, starring Lee Byung-hun and Park Seo-joon

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumets fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Old Henry (2021)
programme.desc: A widowed farmer takes in a mysterious injured man carrying a satchel of cash, but when a posse comes for the money, he is forced to decide who to trust. Defending a siege, he then reveals a surprising gunslinging talent - calling his true identity into question. Western, starring Tim Blake Nelson, Scott Haze and Gavin Lewis

programme.title: Concrete Utopia (2023)
programme.desc: The world has been reduced to rubble by a massive earthquake, and in the heart of Seoul there is only one rsediential building left standing - Hwang Gung Apartments. Outsiders start coming to the flats, and feeling a threat to their survival, the residents enact a special measure. South Korean drama with subtitles, starring Lee Byung-hun and Park Seo-joon

programme.title: Shenandoah (1965)
programme.desc: A Virginian farmer is left to raise seven children after his wife dies. He tries to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but when Union troops abduct his son, and his son-in-law enlists with the Confederates, he is unable to maintain his neutral stance and is dragged into the conflict. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Captain Phillips (2013)
programme.desc: An American cargo ship sets a dangerous course around the coast of Somalia, while inland, four men are pressed into service as pirates by the local warlords. The captain is taken hostage when the raiding party hijacks the vessel, resulting in a tense five-day crisis. Fact-based thriller, starring Tom Hanks and Barkhad Abdi

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In (2024)
programme.desc: A youngster called Chan Lok-kwan accidentally enters the Walled City, discovers the order amidst its chaos, and learns important life lessons along the way. Chinese crime thriller with subtitles, starring Raymond Lam, Louis Koo and Sammo Hung

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Shenandoah (1965)
programme.desc: A Virginian farmer is left to raise seven children after his wife dies. He tries to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but when Union troops abduct his son, and his son-in-law enlists with the Confederates, he is unable to maintain his neutral stance and is dragged into the conflict. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Black Dog (2024)
programme.desc: As part of a patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, former stunt motorcyclist Lang bonds with a hound. Drama, starring Eddie Peng and Tong Liya. In Chinese with English subtitles

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powells mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girls life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Black Dog (2024)
programme.desc: As part of a patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, former stunt motorcyclist Lang bonds with a hound. Drama, starring Eddie Peng and Tong Liya. In Chinese with English subtitles

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powells mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girls life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: The Cinema List
programme.desc: A look at the some of the most notorious lawbreakers in film, from portrayals of ruthless crime bosses to true stories of thieves at large and smugglers on the run

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.sub-title: The Head on the Beach Murder
programme.desc: When body parts wash up on a beach in Arbroath, forensic investigators must unravel the disturbing truth behind a womans death

programme.desc: The shocking story of a devoted mother killed in a machete attack on the way to pick up her children

programme.desc: Traffic officers are called out to help a motorist stranded in freezing conditions, and a driver is caught red-handed using her mobile phone behind the wheel

programme.desc: A blind man uses an electronic eye to see what his own cannot, and a clumsy crook manages to cut his hand badly. Presented by Dom Littlewood

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A neighbourly dispute gets out of hand, a shop worker fears for his life when two violent men burst in, and a thief goes into a pet shop and steals a puppy

programme.desc: Two burglars break into a house but get more than they bargain for. A man steals a computer tablet but gets rumbled by a pawnbroker, and a robber suffers a wardrobe malfunction

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital, focusing on steps to tackle credit card fraud

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of serial killer Dale Cregan, who was sentenced to life in prison after the senseless murders of two men and two police officers in 2012

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: In 2022, the body of Frankie Fitzgerald was found and soon after details emerged of a toxic relationship and a serial killer obsession

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Experts analyse sand found in a car after a man goes missing, leading them to a body and a twisted murder case

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: When police in Colorado interrogated Richard Paul White about the murder of his friend, he began confessing to even more horrifying crimes

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.sub-title: George Joseph Smith - Brides in the Bath
programme.desc: Fred Dinenage examines the crimes of Brides in the Bath murderer and bigamist George Joseph Smith, who drowned his three wives between 1912 and 1914

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: In 2016, mother-of-four Saima Khan was stabbed 68 times while her children slept upstairs. Sabah Khan played the role of the grieving sister, but in truth she was spinning a web of deceit as she had murdered her own sister in a pre-meditated attack

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: After Pennie Davis body was found in 2014, police pieced together her movements before a story unravelled of a deadly grudge and a hired hitman

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of the serial killer Todd Christopher Kohlhepp, who claimed the lives of at least seven innocent people between 2003 and 2016

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Lucy is reported missing by her mother, police and forensic investigators begin the painstaking search for the truth

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A look at the case of Lakhvir Singh, who was found guilty of murdering her former lover by poisoning his curry

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Carly Bateman is found dead in an alley, the police uncover the truth, bringing her killer to justice and peace to a grieving town

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: In February 1995, the city of Bradford in West Yorkshire was shaken to the core by the murder of two children. Fifteen-year-old Rachel Rooney and the boy she was babysitting, seven-year-old Jonathan Copley, were stabbed to death in a violent, sickening attack. Evidence found at the crime scene revealed Rachels common-law stepfather, Tariq Rehman, to be the killer - but the 34-year-old insurance salesman wasnt going down without a fight

programme.title: Libby, Are You Home Yet?
programme.desc: An investigation of the murder of student Libby Squire, whose disappearance after a night out in Hull sparked the biggest manhunt in Humberside Police history

programme.title: Death Row Confidential: Secrets of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Bill Noguera gets a written confession from serial killer Joseph Naso, cracking open another cold case from his list of 10. Detective Mains uncovers more potential victims from an infamous case in New York

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of rapist and murderer Rodney Alcala, who popped up on TVs Dating Game in the middle of a killing spree that it is believed could have claimed as many as 130 victims

programme.title: Murder Uncut
programme.desc: Ashley and her mother Kristine are meeting to co-sign a lease for an apartment, but alarms are raised when Ashley never shows

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: How a pair of fake registration plates on a getaway car helped a detective to solve a series of robberies. Plus, footage of a supermarket cashier standing up to armed robbers

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts shares the best archaeological discoveries of 2018, starting with the North of the UK and a preserved prehistoric village at the black Loch in Myrton. The programme also follows archaeologists uncovering a previously unknown Anglo-Saxon cemetery in Lincolnshire, and a major regeneration project in Salford, unearthing the largest jail in Georgian England. Cameras join the hunt for a lost Second World War reconnaissance Spitfire in Norway and enjoy privileged access to the conservation labs at Vindolanda Roman fort to see what really happens when the digging stops

This episode delves into the truth behind the rumours of Hitlers sex life, including whispers of homosexuality, voyeurism and sadomasochism

programme.title: Hitlers Handmaidens
programme.desc: The Second World War unleashed the full horror of the Nazis on Poland, the Baltic States, Ukraine and Russia. Approximately 500,000 German women served on the Eastern front and the settlement of conquered lands commenced. The colonisers death camps were established with support by secretaries, administrators, SS wives and female concentration camp guards. This episode explores how women were active participants and perpetrators in the war and its attendant atrocities - especially the Holocaust

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Historys greatest geniuses have often said their ideas came from visions or hallucinations. This edition explores the notion that the forces of inspiration the ancients attributed to the gods actually emanated from an otherworldly source

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: From Rasputin to the Nazis, many people throughout history are believed to have tapped into dark powers. This programme considers the validity of such claims

programme.title: Alien Corridors

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Republic P-47 Thunderbolt, a Second World War fighter aircraft produced by the American company Republic Aviation from 1941 until 1945. It was considered a successful high-altitude fighter and also served as the foremost US fighter-bomber in the ground-attack role

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: East: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt

programme.title: Mysteries from Above

programme.sub-title: The Final Flight of Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Actor Laurence Fishburne explores the final flight of Amelia Earhart. In 1937, she took off on the final leg of a record-breaking flight, but failed to arrive at her next stop - a tiny island in the Pacific Ocean. The search for this flier has revealed conflicting stories

programme.title: Troy Story
programme.desc: Part one of two. The legend of the Trojan War, a conflict between the ancient Greeks and the city of Troy, sparked by the abduction of Helen of Sparta by the Trojan prince Paris. In 1874, Heinrich Schliemann announced he had found Troy, setting in motion a golden age of archaeology where a lost Bronze Age world was also rediscovered. Since then, many archaeologists have challenged his claims, but in every generation new findings have kept the search for the city alive. This documentary brings the search up to date drawing upon 21st-century science and archaeology to pinpoint its location

programme.desc: Modern techniques are called upon to investigate the mysteries of the most legendary battles from ancient times. programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014)
programme.desc: The webslinging hero battles a powerful new enemy when a downtrodden engineer develops lethal electrical powers, which he unleashes on those he believes have betrayed him. As if that wasnt enough to keep him busy, he faces an even greater threat when he is reunited with an unstable old friend who has been charged with a sinister mission by his dying father, leading to a series of tense confrontations that threaten to change his life for ever. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx and Dane DeHaan

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II (1986)
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagis is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemys own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends (2025)
programme.desc: Kung fu prodigy Li Fong moves to New York City with his mother and befriends his classmate, Mia. But Connor Day, a local karate champion, provokes Li and publicly humiliates him. Li seeks guidance from his mentor, the kung fu master Mr Han, who reaches out to Daniel LaRusso, convincing the original Karate Kid to teach Li the principles of Miyagi Karate. Drama sequel, starring Jackie Chan, Ben Wang and Ralph Macchio

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012)
programme.desc: A gifted teenager investigates the secrets hidden in his dead parents past, leading him to a mysterious corporation and an incident that imbues him with superhuman powers. A personal tragedy drives him to use his new-found abilities to fight crime, and he is soon drawn into a deadly battle against a former colleague of his father, who has undergone a devastating transformation of his own. Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: Zombieland (2009)
programme.desc: A mutated virus sweeps across America, turning most of the population into hideous flesh-eating zombies. A hard-drinking fearless adventurer leads a small band of young survivors on a perilous journey through the wasteland in search of a safe haven. Comedy horror, with Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg, Emma Stone and Abigail Breslin

Charlie Dimmock goes back to Shoreham-by-Sea in West Sussex to find the formal garden she designed and built has grown into something completely different as the middle section is now a secret garden hidden from view. Inspired by their hard work at keeping the garden, Charlie helps the couple add to it. The presenter also checks in with Kim in Cwmcarn, Monmouthshire, the owner of the steepest garden the team ever built, and a garden in Cosham, Hampshire, that helped one man on the road to recovery

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: In Moorland, Somerset, Alan Titchmarsh surprises the Colquhouns, a couple devastated by the floods of 2014, which arrived in the wake of a major health problem. Sheila had to undergo treatment for breast cancer, but after moving back home, in the year the couple will retire and celebrate their 40th wedding anniversary, Alan and the team attempt to transform their flood-wrecked garden

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick explores Glasgows multi-cultural food scene, tucking into Korean and Pakistani dishes and finding out how Italian food became part of the citys fabric. He also discovers chocolate made by an artisan chocolatier, using it to make profiteroles. Plus, he teams up with his son to cook a family favourite, osso buco

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson and podcaster Rosie Ramsey visit a forest camp in Northumberland set up to help Army veterans, where they sign up for a bushcraft lesson, attempt to build a shelter and make a fire. They also enjoy a buggy race, before Robson meets the horses whose company can help in the treatment of anxiety

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Five years ago, David and John hoped the team could change their long plot into somewhere suitable for their wedding. Charlie Dimmock goes back to Shoreham-by-Sea in West Sussex to find the formal garden she designed and built has grown into something completely different as the middle section is now a secret garden hidden from view. Inspired by their hard work at keeping the garden, Charlie helps the couple add to it. The presenter also checks in with Kim in Cwmcarn, Monmouthshire, the owner of the steepest garden the team ever built, and a garden in Cosham, Hampshire, that helped one man on the road to recovery

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam come up with plans to transform a characterless garden in Daventry into a curvy, naturalistic oasis with a spiritual, Dartmoor-inspired atmosphere

programme.title: Fanny Hill (1983)
programme.desc: Happily engaged to her handsome fiance, Charles, Fanny is soon hit with one misfortune after another until she is forced to become a prostitute to survive. This is the story, with many erotic asides, of her struggle to regain her pride in herself and find happiness in life once again. Period drama, starring Oliver Reed, Lisa Foster, Wilfrid Hyde White and Shelley Winters.

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Becks redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The house holds a celebration of the centenary of the exhibition that discovered the tomb of Tutankhamen, led by the great-grandfather of the current Lord Carnarvon. Lady Carnarvon is writing a book about her husbands famous ancestor, while housekeepers Sheena and Jason are cleaning the Egyptian museum in the basement. Once the domain of the maids and footmen, it now houses replicas from the tomb of Tutankhamen and is a treasure trove that requires them to use special cleaning techniques

programme.desc: The story of Gulistan Subasi, who was shot dead on her mothers doorstep in Hackney in 2010. The killing was a contract hit, and forensic work led to the killers conviction.

programme.title: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: The story of businessman Alan Helmick, who was found dead in his home, leading the Police to uncover a tangled web of fraud and theft.

programme.title: Murder UK

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A zombie movie being filmed on the island ends in real-life horror when a stand-in is poisoned - and new detective inspector Humphrey soon deduces that the unfortunate victim was not the killers intended target. He believes the culprit was after lead actress Lexi Cunningham, but the murder plot went wrong. The Caribbean cops focus their attention on three suspects - film director Carl Collins, screenwriter Arnold Finch and production assistant Susie Jenkins. But why would any of them want the star dead? Michelle Ryan, Peter Davison and Hannah Tointon guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal OHanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JPs past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A zombie movie being filmed on the island ends in real-life horror when a stand-in is poisoned - and new detective inspector Humphrey soon deduces that the unfortunate victim was not the killers intended target. He believes the culprit was after lead actress Lexi Cunningham, but the murder plot went wrong. The Caribbean cops focus their attention on three suspects - film director Carl Collins, screenwriter Arnold Finch and production assistant Susie Jenkins. But why would any of them want the star dead? Michelle Ryan, Peter Davison and Hannah Tointon guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal OHanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JPs past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Broadcasters Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck drive along the Ho Chi Minh Trail, a network of roads and paths in Southeast Asia that was littered with unexploded bombs following the Vietnam War. Their journey takes them through jungles and mountains to some of the least-explored corners of Laos and Vietnam, and proves to be a gruelling test of their bravery, motoring skills and senses of humour

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Counter Terrorism Policing foil an Islamist terror plot, and the CPS Special Crime Unit bring those responsible for a fatal crash on the M62 to justice

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Manchester police take down a gang of teen car thieves, and the Serious Fraud Office unravels a 400-million-pound global fraud in the steel industry

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The crew at Downer Rail in Sydney fix a leaking air conditioner while QRs Rail Operations Response Unit remove debris from high voltage train power lines

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets his good friend, the actor and comedian Barry Humphries, who fell in love with Cornwall in the 1960s when he escaped London to develop his famous character Dame Edna Everage. Barry talks about his friendship with British poet John Betjeman, and asks Rick to review his home-made fishcakes. Rick also goes fishing for crab, before cooking a simple yet delicious crab omelette. The host then takes a dip in the chilly north Atlantic with an eccentric group of wild water swimmers called the Perranporth Blue Tits

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britains finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britains fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers become suspicious when they pull over a businessman from Mexico who is making a rare journey to the United States in a brand new car

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A driver is stopped attempting to smuggle 15kg of cocaine across the border, and a truck drivers modified cab attracts attention at the World Trade Bridge

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer leaves his comfort zone as he attempts to set a world speed record for a hovercraft. These machines are notoriously difficult to control, so to learn the basic skills needed hes put through his paces by Royal Marines in a military training operation. To achieve his goal, Guy will need to stay over 86mph for a kilometre, but at these speeds, because of the hovercrafts inherent instability, even the most experienced pilots can lose control - and the worsening weather makes things much more challenging

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May attempt to improve the ambulance, with the presenters all going their own separate ways to enhance one area they think could do with an overhaul. James focuses on passenger comfort, Richard tries to shorten response times by getting other drivers out of the way more effectively, an issue Jeremy tackles with the invention of what he calls the sports ambulance. Their three very different creations are then put to the test with a series of severe and often messy challenges. Plus, Formula One driver Daniel Ricciardo is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the BMW M4 at the track, before switching to the German manufacturers hybrid-powered i8 for a trip up the A1 to Whitby, North Yorkshire, where he decides which of the two he would rather take for the drive home. Richard Hammond pays tribute to the Land Rover by attempting to drive one straight up the side of a dam, and James May puts the Mercedes AMG GT through its paces. Taking to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car are Will Smith and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create gourmet lunches on a tight budget, receiving tips from one of Britains leading Indian chefs and getting insider advice on buying wine on a shoestring. Finally, they put everything they have learned to the test when they arrange a surprise meal for a dinner lady

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel travel along more than 1,200 miles of hazardous roads in Ethiopia on a journey to Aksum, the countrys holiest place. However, they have to contend with more than fatigue and unreliable terrain to reach their destination, as they encounter drug-taking truck drivers, suffer a disastrous breakdown and start to run out of fuel at the worst possible time

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary series following a cast of Australian road train drivers as they haul cargo across the Outback - the drivers are often away from their families for weeks at a time chasing contracts along some of the world?s longest roads. The drivers all have highly specialised road skills and knowledge of the local environment - with their trailers in tow, they battle unforgiving terrain and weather conditions to deliver food, cattle and construction supplies to those who need it the most.

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwalls hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the areas history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A Cuban woman crosses the bridge in the hope of being granted political asylum in America, while officers in Laredo stop three students carrying something unusual in their car

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers are stunned when they discover more than $2million of cocaine mixed in with gallons of household paint and bottles of beer

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorbike fan takes on the challenge of building the worlds fastest soapbox racer in an attempt to set a new speed record using just the pull of gravity and a tarmac road. To get to grips with going blisteringly fast on a public road, Guy tries his hand at street luge with former global champion Helene Schmit, before joining his team of engineers to explore the science of rolling resistance and the importance of tyre pressure. Armed with what they believe to be the perfect formula, they produce a unique soapbox cart inspired by Mother Nature and, after training with the Team GB womens bobsled pair, confidence is high - but are disaster and mayhem just around the corner?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May encounter artillery shells, corsets and classic hot hatchbacks as they take a nostalgic look at French company Peugeot, while Richard Hammond is at the test track to compare the Porsche Cayman GTS with the latest Chevrolet Corvette. James also takes the 950bhp LaFerrari hybrid hypercar out for a spin in Italy, and singer Olly Murs is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. The distress signal is sent directly to Jeremy Clarkson and James May, who get their hands on two machines and set off on an epic adventure to find their colleague. Jeremy puts the 471bhp Lexus RC F coupe thought its paces, and actress Gillian Anderson takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create a restaurant-quality meal on the tightest of budgets. They pick up some insider tips from Michelin-starred chef David Everitt-Matthias, are inspired by the work of celebrated 19th-century cook Alexis Soyer, and put everything theyve learnt into practice when they help three girls say thank you to two people who are very important to them

To achieve his goal, Guy will need to stay over 86mph for a kilometre, but at these speeds, because of the hovercrafts inherent instability, even the most experienced pilots can lose control - and the worsening weather makes things much more challenging

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May attempt to improve the ambulance, with the presenters all going their own separate ways to enhance one area they think could do with an overhaul. James focuses on passenger comfort, Richard tries to shorten response times by getting other drivers out of the way more effectively, an issue Jeremy tackles with the invention of what he calls the sports ambulance. Their three very different creations are then put to the test with a series of severe and often messy challenges. Plus, Formula One driver Daniel Ricciardo is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the BMW M4 at the track, before switching to the German manufacturers hybrid-powered i8 for a trip up the A1 to Whitby, North Yorkshire, where he decides which of the two he would rather take for the drive home. Richard Hammond pays tribute to the Land Rover by attempting to drive one straight up the side of a dam, and James May puts the Mercedes AMG GT through its paces. Taking to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car are Will Smith and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create gourmet lunches on a tight budget, receiving tips from one of Britains leading Indian chefs and getting insider advice on buying wine on a shoestring. Finally, they put everything they have learned to the test when they arrange a surprise meal for a dinner lady

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets his good friend, the actor and comedian Barry Humphries, who fell in love with Cornwall in the 1960s when he escaped London to develop his famous character Dame Edna Everage. Barry talks about his friendship with British poet John Betjeman, and asks Rick to review his home-made fishcakes. Rick also goes fishing for crab, before cooking a simple yet delicious crab omelette. The host then takes a dip in the chilly north Atlantic with an eccentric group of wild water swimmers called the Perranporth Blue Tits

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britains finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britains fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel travel along more than 1,200 miles of hazardous roads in Ethiopia on a journey to Aksum, the countrys holiest place. However, they have to contend with more than fatigue and unreliable terrain to reach their destination, as they encounter drug-taking truck drivers, suffer a disastrous breakdown and start to run out of fuel at the worst possible time

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary series following a cast of Australian road train drivers as they haul cargo across the Outback - the drivers are often away from their families for weeks at a time chasing contracts along some of the world?s longest roads. The drivers all have highly specialised road skills and knowledge of the local environment - with their trailers in tow, they battle unforgiving terrain and weather conditions to deliver food, cattle and construction supplies to those who need it the most.

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwalls hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorbike fan takes on the challenge of building the worlds fastest soapbox racer in an attempt to set a new speed record using just the pull of gravity and a tarmac road. To get to grips with going blisteringly fast on a public road, Guy tries his hand at street luge with former global champion Helene Schmit, before joining his team of engineers to explore the science of rolling resistance and the importance of tyre pressure. Armed with what they believe to be the perfect formula, they produce a unique soapbox cart inspired by Mother Nature and, after training with the Team GB womens bobsled pair, confidence is high - but are disaster and mayhem just around the corner?

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor begins the next part of his journey on Mundoo Island, which has provided shelter and a way of life for five generations of one farming family. Martin Clunes joins Colin and Sally Grundy for a day of cattle mustering. He also explores Phillip Island, one of Australias favourite playgrounds, then heads south to King Island, in the blustery Bass Strait between Tasmania and mainland Australia. Martin completes his odyssey with a visit to see one of the regions most iconic creatures, the Tasmanian Devil

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rule of Adolf Hitler and his party, focusing on the Eastern Front during the Second World War, which many see as the defining arena of the conflict. In the autumn of 1940, Adolf Hitler has to decide what to do about the Soviet Union and its leader Joseph Stalin. He offers to carve up the post-war world in exchange for his fellow dictators support in the war against Britain, but is actually preparing an attack on the USSR

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In January 1942 the German army lost the battle for Moscow and a furious Hitler sacked or side-lined his leading generals and appointed himself commander-in-chief of the army. He decided on a bold new plan, focusing his forces on seizing the Soviet oil fields and taking the fuel to supply his own troops. Stalin unveiled his own plan to drive the Germans out of the Soviet Union by launching a huge offensive from Leningrad to the Black Sea. Georgy Zhukov warned him that the Red Army was in no shape to attack, but Stalin banished the former chief of the general staff to the front and took control

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler retreats from public life as he faces defeat on the Eastern Front after the Red Armys triumph at Stalingrad, with senior Nazis competing to prove themselves as his most valuable deputy. Meanwhile, student resistance group the White Rose call on the youth of Germany to rise up and overthrow Hitler and the Nazis, and Claus von Stauffenberg is part of a military resistance network who are planning to kill the Fuhrer
